title: Create Recycling
description: Recycle: effortlessly auto-generate Create crushing wheel recycling recipes for any mod via a datapack.
body:
Recycle revolutionizes your Create-based Minecraft experience by automatically generating crushing wheel “recycling” recipes for virtually every item in your modpack. Upon first world or server startup, the mod scans all registered items and emits a custom datapack containing matching recipes—no manual JSON editing required. Simply restart your world or server once to load the new datapack, and you’ll immediately be able to feed unwanted blocks and items into your crushing wheels to reclaim their components.

Key features:

Universal Compatibility: Works with any mods that add blocks or items—ReCycle dynamically creates recipes for all of them.

Automated Datapack Generation: No more tedious recipe coding; everything is generated on world boot.

Easy Installation: Drop the mod into your mods folder, launch once, then restart to activate the recycling recipes.

Configurable Output: Tweak output ratios and filter unwanted recipes via the already generated recipe files.

Say goodbye to manual recipe wrangling and hello to seamless, sustainable automation in your Create contraptions!
